work.summary: Original scope: insert Step 2 'Understand the Workflow' in docs/getting-started.md covering the 7-phase pipeline (Grill Me, PRD->Spec, Kanban, Implement, QA, Review, Ship). Expanded scope after audit: (1) reconciled headline counts (21 agents -> 24, 62 skills -> 69, 57 ADRs -> 58, 49 skills -> 69, 26 specialized -> 24), (2) removed dead skill-installer references, (3) rewrote Fastest Start around the working /install-plugin path because @rjmurillo/ai-agents is not published to npm, (4) applied CodeRabbit Day/Night Shift QA-sign-off clarification, (5) fixed README L314 missing 'non-functional' gate name, (6) de-duplicated backlog-generator and added missing agents (issue-feature-review, merge-resolver, negotiation), (7) fixed session-log JSON schema to satisfy the required 'Aggregate Results' CI gate.
decisions: Pushed back on CodeRabbit's L71 PASS/WARN/CRITICAL_FAIL claim: that terminology is what /test gates emit per .claude/commands/test.md; PASS/FAIL/NEEDS WORK is the QA-agent verdict format, a different surface.
Did not publish @rjmurillo/ai-agents to npm in this PR; rewrote Fastest Start around /install-plugin (which works) instead of leaving a broken npx command in the headline.

Used 24 as the canonical agent count: it matches both src/claude/ and src/copilot-cli/ plugin contents and marketplace.json. Per-platform asymmetries (spec-generator only in src/claude, backlog-generator only in src/copilot-cli) are noted in the catalog rather than papered over.
